title: hymenophyllum acanthoides
intro: Hymenophyllum acanthoides, also known as the prickly fern or prickly maidenhair fern, is a species of fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum acanthoides include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its use as a natural antiseptic to prevent infection. Hymenophyllum acanthoides can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and has also been used in traditional remedies for its ability to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
